### Performance Breakdown

| Strategy | Signals | Win Rate | Maker EV | Sharpe | Regime Decay |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Volatility Regime Mismatch | 34 | 32.4% | -2.496 | -0.595 | yes |
| Order Book / Flow Imbalance | 5 | 0.0% | -3.131 | -0.500 | no |
| Cross-Timeframe Constraint Violation | 21 | 0.0% | -6.300 | -0.716 | no |
| Post-Extreme Mean Reversion | 1 | 0.0% | -50.438 | 0.000 | no |
| Residual Horizon Fair Value | 8 | 50.0% | 0.000 | 0.000 | no |
| Chainlink vs Binance Basis Lag | 0 | 0.0% | 0.000 | 0.000 | no |

### Next Actions

- Increase data collection horizon to reach >=100 signals for top strategy.
- Tighten entry thresholds or drop low-confidence signals for top strategy.
- Retune confidence calibration bins/prior and re-evaluate top strategy calibration drift.
- Promote top informed-flow convergence variant to focused shadow tracking until it clears signal-count and p-value gates.
- Run ML scanner on next 6-hour interval for new feature proposals.", "fontSize": 12, "openLinksInNewTab": true}}
